properties.name: Queen of Heaven Catholic Cemetery, Hillside, Cook, Illinois, United States
properties.std_name: Queen of Heaven Catholic Cemetery, Hillside, Cook County, Illinois, United States
properties.admin_hierarchy: United States > Illinois > Cook County > Hillside
properties.notes: Roman Catholic cemetery, consecrated 1947, 472 acres, ~122,000+ burials. Operated by Catholic Cemeteries of the Archdiocese of Chicago. GPS from FindAGrave memorial #288488976; FS extract gave less precise (41.8578, -87.9091). Plot for Ugo Mariotti: Section 40, Block 213, Lot 7, Grave 8.

properties.name: Bedford, Taylor, Iowa, United States
properties.std_name: Bedford, Taylor County, Iowa, United States
properties.admin_hierarchy: United States > Iowa > Taylor County > Bedford
properties.notes: County seat of Taylor County, southwestern Iowa near MO border. Ugo Mariotti's primary residence ~1928–~1950+ (per 1930, 1940, 1950 censuses; 1927 marriage was in nearby Lenox, also Taylor Co). Proprietor of a candy kitchen here per 1950 census.

properties.name: Lenox, Taylor, Iowa, United States
properties.std_name: Lenox, Taylor County, Iowa, United States
properties.admin_hierarchy: United States > Iowa > Taylor County > Lenox
properties.notes: Small town in Taylor County, IA where Ugo Mariotti and Lena Dini were married 5 May 1927.

properties.name: Ellis Island, New York City, New York, United States
properties.std_name: Ellis Island, New York City, New York, United States
properties.admin_hierarchy: United States > New York > New York City > Ellis Island
properties.notes: U.S. immigration inspection station 1892-1954. Point of arrival for Ugo Mariotti 3 Sep 1920 aboard SS Giuseppe Verdi from Genoa.

properties.name: Genoa, Liguria, Italy
properties.notes: Port of departure for Ugo Mariotti on SS Giuseppe Verdi, August 1920 — the principal Italian emigration port for Tuscan and Ligurian departures (Naples and Palermo dominated southern Italian streams).

properties.name: Westchester, Cook County, Illinois
